title: Full Stack Developer
description:
## About the Role

Safaricom Ethiopia is looking for a talented **Full Stack Developer** to join our engineering team. You will design, build, and maintain scalable web applications supporting our telecom infrastructure.

## Responsibilities
- Build RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express
- Develop responsive frontend applications with React and TypeScript
- Collaborate with mobile teams on M-Pesa integrations
- Write unit and integration tests
- Participate in code reviews and architectural decisions

## Requirements
- 3+ years of full-stack development experience
- Proficiency in React, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL
- Experience with cloud services (AWS or GCP)
- Strong understanding of REST API design
- Excellent communication skills

title: Data Scientist
description:
## About the Role

Shega is Ethiopia's leading tech media company. We are hiring a **Data Scientist** to extract insights from our large content and audience datasets.

## Responsibilities
- Build NLP pipelines to analyze Ethiopian tech content
- Develop recommendation algorithms
- Create dashboards using Python and BI tools
- Collaborate with product and editorial teams

## Requirements
- Strong Python skills (pandas, scikit-learn, NLTK)
- Experience with NLP and text classification
- Knowledge of SQL and data warehousing
- Familiarity with visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI)

title: Backend Engineer (Python/Django)
description:
## About the Role

Afrwork is Africa's premier freelance platform. We need a **Backend Engineer** to build and scale our platform APIs.

## Responsibilities
- Develop and maintain Django REST Framework APIs
- Optimize database queries in PostgreSQL
- Integrate payment APIs (Telebirr, Chapa)
- Handle file upload and storage pipelines
- Write comprehensive API documentation

## Requirements
- 2+ years Django/Python backend experience
- PostgreSQL and Redis experience
- Familiarity with Celery for async tasks
- Understanding of OAuth2 and JWT authentication

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
## About the Role

Geez AI Labs is building AI tools for Amharic and African languages. We need a creative **UI/UX Designer** to design inclusive, accessible products.

## Responsibilities
- Create wireframes, prototypes, and design systems in Figma
- Conduct user research with Ethiopian user cohorts
- Ensure WCAG accessibility standards
- Collaborate closely with engineering team

## Requirements
- Portfolio demonstrating mobile and web design
- Figma proficiency (auto-layout, components, variables)
- Understanding of design systems
- Experience designing for low-bandwidth environments

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
## About the Role

CBE Digital is modernizing Ethiopia's largest bank. We're looking for a **DevOps Engineer** to build our CI/CD and cloud infrastructure.

## Responsibilities
- Manage Kubernetes clusters on AWS EKS
- Build CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitHub Actions
- Monitor system health with Prometheus and Grafana
- Implement infrastructure-as-code with Terraform

## Requirements
- 3+ years DevOps/SRE experience
- Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform proficiency
- Experience with AWS or Azure
- Strong Linux administration skills

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
## About the Role

iCog Labs is a leading AI research company in Africa. We are hiring an **ML Engineer** to work on Amharic NLP, robotics, and general AI projects.

## Responsibilities
- Build and train NLP models for Amharic text
- Implement TF-IDF, word embeddings, and transformers
- Develop model serving APIs with FastAPI
- Collaborate with research scientists

## Requirements
- Strong Python and ML fundamentals
- Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow
- NLP experience (NLTK, spaCy, Hugging Face)
- Publication or project portfolio in AI/ML

title: Mobile Developer (React Native)
description:
## About the Role

Chapa is Ethiopia's #1 payment gateway. Join our mobile team to build the next generation of fintech apps for millions of Ethiopians.

## Responsibilities
- Build React Native apps for iOS and Android
- Integrate Chapa payment SDK
- Implement biometric authentication
- Optimize app performance for low-end devices

## Requirements
- 2+ years React Native experience
- Understanding of mobile security
- Experience with Redux or Zustand
- Published app on Play Store or App Store

title: Frontend Developer (React/Next.js)
description:
## About the Role

Eshi Express is Ethiopia's growing e-commerce logistics platform. We need a **Frontend Developer** to craft beautiful, fast web experiences.

## Responsibilities
- Build performant Next.js applications
- Implement pixel-perfect UI from Figma designs
- Optimize Core Web Vitals
- Write accessible, semantic HTML

## Requirements
- 2+ years React/Next.js experience
- Tailwind CSS proficiency
- TypeScript knowledge
- Understanding of web performance optimization

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description:
## About the Role

Ethio Telecom is the national telecom operator. We're seeking a **Cybersecurity Analyst** to protect our infrastructure from evolving threats.

## Responsibilities
- Monitor SOC alerts and respond to incidents
- Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing
- Develop security policies and training materials
- Analyze threat intelligence feeds

## Requirements
- CEH, CompTIA Security+, or CISSP certification
- Experience with SIEM tools (Splunk, IBM QRadar)
- Network security fundamentals
- Scripting skills (Python, Bash)

title: Product Manager
description:
## About the Role

Kifiya is a leading fintech innovator in East Africa. We need a **Product Manager** to own the roadmap for our digital credit and payment products.

## Responsibilities
- Define product vision and roadmap
- Write detailed PRDs and user stories
- Work closely with engineering, design, and data teams
- Conduct market research and competitive analysis

## Requirements
- 3+ years product management experience
- Strong data analysis skills
- Experience with agile/scrum teams
- Financial services or fintech background preferred

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description:
## About the Role

Microsoft ADC Ethiopia is expanding. We're looking for a **Cloud Solutions Architect** to help enterprises in Ethiopia migrate to Azure.

## Responsibilities
- Design Azure cloud architectures for enterprise clients
- Lead technical workshops and proof-of-concept projects
- Work with local system integrators
- Develop Azure certification programs

## Requirements
- Azure Solutions Architect Expert certification
- 5+ years cloud architecture experience
- Strong enterprise sales enablement skills
- Excellent presentation and communication ability

title: Junior Software Developer
description:
## About the Role

HahuCloud is a growing SaaS platform for Ethiopian businesses. We offer mentorship and growth for **Junior Developers** joining our team.

## Responsibilities
- Assist senior developers with feature implementation
- Fix bugs and improve test coverage
- Learn and apply React and Node.js
- Participate in daily standups

## Requirements
- CS degree or equivalent bootcamp
- Basic HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- Eagerness to learn
- Portfolio projects on GitHub

title: Blockchain Developer
description:
## About the Role

Dashen Bank's Innovation Lab is exploring DeFi and blockchain solutions for Ethiopian banking. We need a **Blockchain Developer** to prototype and build.

## Responsibilities
- Write and audit smart contracts in Solidity
- Build dApps with Web3.js / Ethers.js
- Explore Hyperledger Fabric for permissioned blockchain
- Work with compliance teams on regulatory requirements

## Requirements
- Experience with Ethereum and Solidity
- Understanding of DeFi protocols
- Strong cryptography fundamentals
- Experience with testing frameworks (Hardhat)

title: Database Administrator (PostgreSQL)
description:
## About the Role

Ethiopian Airlines IT department is hiring a **Database Administrator** to manage mission-critical PostgreSQL databases supporting global operations.

## Responsibilities
- Manage and optimize PostgreSQL databases
- Implement backup, recovery, and replication strategies
- Tune query performance
- Collaborate with application teams on schema design

## Requirements
- 3+ years PostgreSQL DBA experience
- Expertise in indexing, query optimization, EXPLAIN plans
- Experience with replication (streaming, logical)
- Familiarity with monitoring (pg_stat, Datadog)

title: AI Product Researcher
description:
## About the Role

Amhara Bank is investing in AI-powered customer service. We need an **AI Product Researcher** to evaluate AI tools for banking use cases in Ethiopia.

## Responsibilities
- Research AI applications in financial services
- Evaluate LLMs and chatbot platforms for Amharic
- Write technical reports for leadership
- Prototype AI demos using OpenAI or Gemini APIs

## Requirements
- Background in AI, computer science, or related field
- Ability to evaluate and compare AI products
- Strong written communication in English and Amharic
- API integration experience

title: QA Engineer
description:
## About the Role

Logic Soft builds enterprise software for Ethiopian businesses. We need a **QA Engineer** to ensure quality across our product suite.

## Responsibilities
- Write and maintain automated test suites with Playwright
- Perform manual testing on web and mobile apps
- Report bugs with detailed reproduction steps
- Collaborate with developers on CI/CD quality gates

## Requirements
- Experience with Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium
- Understanding of agile testing methodologies
- Strong attention to detail
- SQL skills for database verification

title: Scrum Master / Agile Coach
description:
## About the Role

Global Bank is digitizing operations coast to coast. We seek a **Scrum Master** to facilitate agile teams building our digital banking products.

## Responsibilities
- Facilitate sprint planning, standups, retros
- Remove blockers and shield team from distractions
- Track velocity and burn-down charts
- Coach product owners on backlog management

## Requirements
- CSM or PSM certification
- 2+ years as Scrum Master in software teams
- Jira administration experience
- Excellent facilitation and communication skills

title: Technical Content Writer
description:
## About the Role

Shega is looking for a **Technical Content Writer** to produce high-quality articles on Ethiopia's tech ecosystem, startups, and digital trends.

## Responsibilities
- Write 4–6 articles per week on tech topics
- Interview founders, engineers, and investors
- Translate technical concepts for general audiences
- Use SEO best practices

## Requirements
- Excellent writing skills in English (Amharic is a plus)
- Understanding of software, AI, or fintech
- Portfolio of published articles
- Ability to meet deadlines consistently

title: Embedded Systems Engineer (IoT)
description:
## About the Role

Hawassa University IoT Research Lab is conducting smart agriculture and health monitoring research. We need an **Embedded Systems Engineer** to build prototypes.

## Responsibilities
- Program microcontrollers (Arduino, STM32, ESP32)
- Design sensor networks for data collection
- Integrate IoT devices with cloud backend (MQTT, AWS IoT)
- Document hardware designs and firmware

## Requirements
- Experience with C/C++ for embedded
- Knowledge of MQTT, HTTP, BLE protocols
- PCB design experience (Eagle or KiCad)
- Understanding of power management

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description:
## About the Role

Dashen Brewery is implementing data-driven operations. We need a **BI Analyst** to build dashboards and analytical reports for business leaders.

## Responsibilities
- Build Power BI and Tableau dashboards
- Write complex SQL queries for data extraction
- Collaborate with operations and sales teams
- Design and maintain data warehouse models

## Requirements
- 2+ years business intelligence experience
- Power BI or Tableau certification preferred
- Strong SQL skills (CTEs, window functions)
- Experience with Excel and data modeling

title: Network Engineer
description:
## About the Role

Ethio Telecom needs a **Network Engineer** to manage and expand our nationwide fiber and wireless network infrastructure.

## Responsibilities
- Configure and maintain Cisco/Juniper routers and switches
- Design and implement MPLS and BGP routing
- Troubleshoot network outages rapidly
- Plan capacity and network expansion

## Requirements
- CCNA or CCNP certification required
- 3+ years enterprise network engineering
- Experience with fiber optic infrastructure
- Strong troubleshooting and documentation skills

title: Software Engineer – Fintech (Go/Golang)
description:
## About the Role

HelloCash is Ethiopia's largest mobile money platform. We're looking for a **Go Engineer** to build high-throughput transaction systems.

## Responsibilities
- Design and implement microservices in Go
- Build real-time transaction processing pipelines
- Integrate with Telebirr, CBE Birr, and M-Pesa APIs
- Write performance benchmarks and load tests

## Requirements
- 2+ years Go programming experience
- Microservices architecture experience
- gRPC and Protocol Buffers knowledge
- Understanding of distributed systems and CAP theorem
